portfolio: System design, data flow, ranking algorithms, action composition model
notes: ADR-001 draft filed; awaits peer review. Resolves all five commander Wave 2 directives: nucleo-matcher adopted v1; p99 budgets named (first-paint 50ms, action-spawn 30ms); empty index is banner+hint, not error; WAL autocheckpoint disabled, writer yields on QUERY_ACTIVE < 500ms; candidate scope is every non-tombstoned row in current scan_generation. Key calls beyond the brief: visit credit on action execution only (not on search result appearance), tanh soft-normalisation of match and frecency for streaming-stable blending, tie-breakers (visits_total, shorter path, lexicographic, rowid). ADR-004 still to draft.
